name: directory layout: _universal/ is recognized as the cross-cutting namespace where g-universal-* rules live (per G-3)
command:
mkdir -p tree/_universal && printf 'source:
  id: u-src
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: "https://a.com"
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
  content_hash: "sha256:S"
rules:
  - id: g-universal-a
    name: a
    description: x
    detector: x
recommended_set: []
all_set: [g-universal-a]
' > tree/_universal/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json > out.json 2>err.txt && grep -E '"id":"g-universal-a"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
